name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at their Detroit location and online.
description_long: US Cash Advance is a loan storefront operating at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, offering fast short-term lending solutions for consumers needing immediate cash. The company specializes in small payday loans ($1,000 or less), cash advances, and larger bad credit loans ranging from $250 to $50,000, positioning itself as an option for borrowers regardless of credit history. Their service model combines in-person office visits with online application options, with a stated process of fast approval and same-day or next-day funding. The company emphasizes transparency and customer service, with staff like Doris mentioned in multiple reviews for patience and clear explanation of terms. Customer testimonials highlight processing times under 45 minutes for in-person transactions and same-day cash delivery. The Detroit location operates extended hours (8am–9pm weekdays, 10am–7pm weekends) to accommodate working consumers. However, the website contains concerning elements: multiple customer reviews appear duplicated or slightly altered (the "Grilled G" review mentions "Express Payday Loans" rather than US Cash Advance), and the company uses third-party lenders for actual loan origination. The contact information shows a Charlotte, NC corporate address despite the Michigan storefront focus. Terms and conditions are incomplete on the website, with the APR disclosure section cut off mid-sentence.
address: 2413 Nicollet Ave unit A2, Minneapolis, MN 55404

company_info.headquarters: 2413 Nicollet Ave unit A2, Minneapolis, MN 55404

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available with reported processing times under 45 minutes
Accepts all credit types including bad credit applicants with no credit check loans offered
Loan amounts range from $100 to $50,000, covering both emergency micro-loans and larger needs
No collateral required for unsecured loans
Extended business hours including weekends (10am–7pm Saturday–Sunday)
Staff reported as patient and transparent about terms with no hidden fees mentioned in reviews
Uses third-party lender network for broader approval possibilities
cons: Website contains duplicate or inconsistent customer reviews mentioning different company names, raising authenticity concerns
Terms and conditions page cuts off mid-sentence with incomplete APR disclosure
No transparent disclosure of interest rates, APRs, or fee structure on the public website
Uses third-party lenders rather than direct lending, complicating accountability and terms clarity
Limited physical presence (single Detroit location) despite broader service claims
best_for: Consumers with bad credit needing emergency cash ($100–$1,000) for immediate expenses
Borrowers seeking same-day funding without collateral or extensive documentation
Detroit-area residents with access to the physical location for faster in-person service
Applicants needing larger loans ($5,000–$50,000) who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area consumers and online applicants who need emergency cash within hours and have poor or no credit history. The main caveat is lack of transparent pricing and APR disclosure online, plus credibility concerns from duplicate reviews and incomplete terms—borrowers must visit in person or call (313) 307-3785 to understand actual costs before committing.
